-- Use the known result that in a sifted category, colimation preserves finite products.
  apply isSifted_colim_finiteProduct

refine ⟨fun ι : Finite p => ?_⟩
  -- Use the fact that sifted colimits preserve finite products in the category of types.
  have h : IsFintype ι → PreservesProduct (ι : Type u) (colim : (C ⥤ _) ⥤ Type max u w) := fun h =>
    (IsSifted.colimPreservesFiniteProducts _).preservesProduct _ _ h
  -- Since ι is finite, it is a fintype.
  have h₁ : IsFintype ι := Fintype.isFintype ι
  -- Apply the previous statement with the fintype condition.
  exact h h₁
  <;>
  simp_all [Finite]
  <;>
  infer_instance
